features: SAFE QUALITY: Our extension cords are manufactured to British Standard BS1363A, featuring safety shutters and a 13 amp fuse rating for peace of mind.
2 METRE LONG EXTENSION CORD: With a heavy-duty 2-metre cable housed in durable PVC insulation, enjoy the flexibility to fully extend the power lead and connect multiple sockets.
WALL MOUNTING CAPABILITY: Equipped with hanger holes, our socket extender cable can be effortlessly mounted to a wall plug-in if required, maximising convenience.

4 GANG SOCKET EXTENSION: Never worry about running out of plugs for your electrical appliances and gadgets with our 4-way extension lead. Available in 1-pack, 2-pack, and 3-pack sets to suit your needs
VERSATILE USAGE: Suitable for use in a variety of settings, including home, bedroom, kitchen, and office, our extension lead provides reliable power distribution wherever you need it most.
description: Multi Socket Mains Strip White Extension -The power strip has 4 power outlets. - This power strip has flat plug, it has long extension cord to use for a smartphone, personal computers, laptop. - The etension cord enables you to seat comfortably use the power preotecor strip without having to make movements. - 4 Gang socket extension lead with 13A fuse plug, power cord essential for any home or business.
